key_insights.insight: Luck is often the intersection of preparation and opportunity, emphasizing the importance of skill development.
key_insights.quote: Luck is when preparation meets opportunity.

key_insights.insight: It's crucial to provide tools for kids at a young age to learn how to deal with mental health issues.
key_insights.quote: It's all about creating tools, you know, in our brain for kids as young as five and and you know throughout primary school to learn how to deal with these issues.

key_insights.insight: The absence of visible symptoms doesn't negate the possibility of suicidal thoughts in someone; every case is unique.
key_insights.quote: Everything you know about, or you think you know about someone that is suicidal in quotes is wrong because it doesn't have any form of symptom because that's why each suicide is different to the next.

key_insights.insight: The pressures men place on themselves contribute to mental health challenges, often stemming from societal expectations.
key_insights.quote: The main problem with men is is purely down to is is almost toxic masculinity it's our it's our own kind of fault you know the pressures that we put on ourselves.

key_insights.insight: Suicide transfers pain to others; it doesn't eliminate it.
key_insights.quote: All you are doing is you are transferring it to everyone around you.

key_insights.insight: Fame can be a con in many ways, and can lead to people being in a troubled situation.
key_insights.quote: The more famous you get, it does not become more fun.

key_insights.insight: It's more impactful to genuinely connect with people and appreciate their work than simply taking a picture.
key_insights.quote: I just want to let you know that I really like what you did that means so much more than anyone just running up to you and going get a picture take a picture run off.

key_insights.insight: Having a core friend group helps to ground the famous and successful individuals.
key_insights.quote: They will kill him in conversations or like,do you know what I mean? His cousins will rip him to shreds and all those types of things. And all it does is just ground him constantly.

actionable_advice.advice: Check in with friends regularly and ask if they're okay, and ask again later in the conversation.
actionable_advice.how_to: Choose three friends to check in with, ask "Are you okay?" and then, later in the conversation, revisit the question to see if there is a different answer.

actionable_advice.advice: Parents should be aware of whether or not their kids schools have a mental health declaration.
actionable_advice.how_to: Ask school officials if they have signed a health and safety declaration, and a mental health declaration.

memorable_stories: Roman's story of his friend Joe's suicide, his own mental health struggles and how his mom's advice guided him.
His account of asking his dad to help him get into the music industry, and how his dad could not help him.
Roman's anecdote about show and tell day at school and how he was proud that his dad was on TV
contrarian_claims: Social media isn't the sole cause of increasing mental health disorders.
Telling someone who is feeling depressed to talk about it is the last thing they want to do.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Roman Kemp: Why Communication Is More Important Than Ever
